zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Warwick於1170年出生在英國越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾時，她的父親Robert de Warwick26歲，母親Ann of Plumpton23歲。她和Nigel I De Plumpton至少有2個兒子。她去世於1213年在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Warwick, the county seat of Warwickshire, or from the county itself. The placename derives from Old English wering, wæring ‘dam’ (a derivative of wer, wær ‘weir’) + wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farmstead’ (dative plural wīcum).
habitational name from a much smaller place of the same name in Cumbria. This placename probably derives from Old English waroth ‘bank, shore’ + wīc.

variants.name: Warrick
meanings: from Middle English warrok ‘wedge or twisting stick used to tighten the lashings on a scaffold’, perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a maker of warrocks or a builder of scaffolds. In the building trades the lashings for scaffolds were tightened by driving in wedges called warrocks.

variants.name: Worrick
meanings: English: variant of   Warwick  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Warwick was born in 1170, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert de Warwick, was 26 and her mother, Ann of Plumpton, was 23. She had at least 2 sons with Nigel I De Plumpton. She died in 1213, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.
